title: lithocarpus obovatilimbus
intro: Lithocarpus obovatilimbus, also known as the Chinese bur oak or Lithocarpus, is a species of evergreen tree in the family Fagaceae. It is native to China and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant contains compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to prevent or alleviate various health issues, including cardiovascular disease, diabetes, and certain types of cancer. Lithocarpus obovatilimbus is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to promote overall health and well-being.
